name: Enterprise-Grade Critical Fixes (Foundation)
overview: Address the 14 critical blocking issues identified in production readiness review. These are non-negotiable for launch.

gitWorkflow.preImplementation: git pull origin main && git checkout -b phase1-step-[NUMBER]-[DESCRIPTION]
afterImplementation: After merge: git checkout main && git pull
Update this phase1.json: set status='completed', add commitHash, completedAt

steps.title: Enable PostgreSQL RLS on All Tenant Tables
steps.objective: Activate Row Level Security on every table containing tenant data

step1.description: Audit all tables to identify tenant-scoped tables

step2.description: Create RLS policies for each table

step4.description: Create Fastify middleware to set org context

validation.securityTest: Login as Org A, verify cannot access Org B data
